HDAC6._note: HDAC6 CD2 catalytic Zn pocket. Center = co-crystal Trichostatin A (TSN, chain A resseq 904) centroid; Zn (A/901) lines the pocket. CMT candidate hxq-cmt-hd6-001 (phenyl-thiosemicarbazide benzoic acid) is a PLACEHOLDER scaffold; centroid-recenter (ideal conformer) used (CMT ligand != TSN, so extract_pose template-mapping N/A).

SARM1._note: SARM1 ARM/NAD-related allosteric site. Center = co-crystal ligand 1QD (chain A resseq 801, 54 atoms) centroid. CMT candidate hxq-cmt-sar1-001 (difluoro-quinazolinone) PLACEHOLDER scaffold; ideal-conformer centroid-recenter.

CLC1._note: Human ClC-1 transmembrane domain protopore inhibitor pocket. No co-crystal small-molecule inhibitor in 6COY; center = pore axis midpoint between central Cl S_cen (A/1001) and internal Cl S_int (A/1002), the documented permeation-pathway blocker site (9-AC/CPP/NPPB-class). CMT candidate hxq-cmt-clc1-001 (CF3-pyridyl anthranilic acid, NPPB-like) PLACEHOLDER. CAVEAT: membrane channel, no membrane bilayer in this ABFE box -> SCAFFOLD+POCKET-APPROXIMATE only.

MFN2._note: MFN1/MFN2 GTPase domain. Center = co-crystal GDP (chain A resseq 801, 28 atoms) centroid (nucleotide-binding G-site). CMT candidate hxq-cmt-mfn2-001 (bis-nicotinamide cyclohexyl) PLACEHOLDER; targets a tractable G-site/allosteric pocket. CAVEAT: MFN2 modulators may bind HR1/HR2 conformational sites, not the G-site -> pocket is an approximation.
